GG0170D4_STND_FLWP_CD GG0170D4 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability at Follow-Up Indicates the patient's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in achair or on the side of the bed at follow-up. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity.
